title: jatropha longibracteata
intro: Jatropha longibracteata, also known as the spiny jatropha or spiny coffee tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to Mexico and is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Jatropha longibracteata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
